d: Dinesh Kumar Srivastav, aka Dino, a sincere, socially awkward, trivia-loving nerd, is secretly in love with his co-worker, the beautiful Meera Ranganathan. Way out of his league! So, when the entire office travels to Japan for the annual company offsite, a heartbroken Dino makes a wish at the famous Fortune Bell that Meera be with him for just one day, not realizing that this one wish will throw his and Meera's lives into total chaos!
